name: Expo (React Native)
description: Build cross-platform mobile apps with Expo + React Native + TypeScript. Metro bundler is supervised by the runtime; web preview is rendered via react-native-web. Real-device preview is exposed via an Expo tunnel + QR.

quickCommands.label: Clear Metro Cache
quickCommands.description: Restart Expo with --clear to flush the Metro cache

quickCommands.label: Expo Prebuild
quickCommands.description: Regenerate native iOS/Android projects from app.json
